reasoning: The sword_fire_v00 asset is a tall golden/yellow flaming sword with blue fire at its base, placed at the boundary between the dark red dungeon tiles and the lighter teal area. Locatability is good — the bright warm gold against the cool dark background is spottable well within 0.5s. Silhouette is clean and sword-shaped with no ambiguity about the object type. The blue flame base adds contrast depth. Pixel art style is consistent with the Echoes game aesthetic. Main concerns: (1) the asset straddles the dark-red-tile/grey-tile boundary, creating minor visual split that could weaken the perceived outline on its lower half; (2) without other characters in the scene, the tall humanoid-scale sprite could briefly be mistaken for the player entity on first glance. No significant hue clash with background — the warm gold pops clearly from the teal/dark environment. Overall clean and mostly well-integrated, held back slightly by boundary placement and scale ambiguity.
